description_long: This is a heavily armored tracked combat vehicle resembling a World War II-era tank destroyer, featuring a low-profile, angular hull and a prominent, long-barreled main cannon mounted in a fixed superstructure. The vehicle is equipped with six large road wheels on each side, supported by continuous metal tracks for enhanced mobility over rough terrain. The upper hull is sharply sloped for increased ballistic protection, with visible hatches, periscopes, and a commander's cupola on the roof. The rear section includes exhaust outlets and stowage compartments, while the sides display external storage boxes and spare track links. Antennas and other communication equipment are mounted on the roof, indicating command and control capabilities. The overall finish is a uniform matte gray, with no visible camouflage or military insignia.
description: A low-profile, angular armored combat vehicle with a long cannon, continuous tracks, and a matte gray finish. Features include sloped armor, roof hatches, and external storage.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the cannon, six large road wheels, continuous tracks, and external storage boxes on the rear side.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the sharply sloped armor, the main gun barrel extending forward, and the symmetrical arrangement of the tracks and wheels.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the rear exhaust outlets, additional storage, and the full profile of the vehicle's angular hull.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the back of the hull, exhaust outlets, and the rearward arrangement of the tracks and wheels.
attribute_weapon_mounts: One large cannon mounted in the fixed superstructure (front/center), one small mount on the roof (likely for a machine gun), and possible periscope or observation mounts.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body coverage with thick, sharply sloped steel armor plating; reinforced front and side panels; no visible modular or reactive panels.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: None visible; solid matte gray color.
